title: T-014 — UI: OEE-001 Per-line 24h Trend page (oee_line_trend_page prototype, 15-OEE-d)
prompt:
# T-014 — OEE-001 Per-line 24h Trend page UI

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.1, §15.1, §15.7 (UI matrix) + UX prototypes/design/15-OEE-UX.md:254-393
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:3-209 (oee_line_trend_page)

## Goal
Server Component page `/oee/line/[id]` rendering 4 ArcGauge KPI cards (A/P/Q/OEE) + multi-line TrendChart (A blue, P green, Q amber, OEE black bold) with downtime bands + changeover markers + Top Downtime Causes pareto + 7-day spark + window/shift filters, matching prototype 1:1 with shadcn primitives.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/page.tsx` (RSC): calls T-011 loader with URL search params (?window=1h|6h|24h, ?shift=all|AM|PM|Night) and passes data to client component `LineTrendClient`.
2. `LineTrendClient` ('use client'): renders ArcGauge quartet, recharts ComposedChart (with ReferenceArea = downtime, ReferenceLine = changeover), TopDowntimeCauses list, Spark 7-day, controls. SWR refreshInterval 60s per §10.1 (incremental fetch).
3. URL search params drive state (line=… &window=24h &shift=all) per translation note (shareable deep links).
4. Target dashed-red ReferenceLine from oee_alert_thresholds (per-line override or tenant default).
5. Auto-refresh pause integration via OEE-M-012 modal (covered by separate modal task; this task wires the trigger button only).
6. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist (4 ArcGauges + Trend chart + 7-day spark + Top Downtime + controls) verifying match against prototype line range.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/_components/line-trend-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/_components/__tests__/line-trend-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/line/[id]/_components/arc-gauge.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:3-209 (oee_line_trend_page), then it has the same 4 ArcGauge header row + Trend chart + Top Downtime Causes + 7-day Spark + window/shift controls — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given URL ?window=6h, when page renders, then loader is called with window=6h and chart x-axis spans 6h (V-OEE-ACCESS-3 RLS still enforced).
3. Given the SWR loop is mounted for 61 s, when network log is inspected, then a /api/oee/line/[id]/trend request fired at ~60 s per §10.1 polling contract.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: dashed-red target line at oee_alert_thresholds.oee_target_pct (default 70% per §13.1); Top Downtime causes list shows max 3 entries; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity + window URL behaviour + 60s SWR + target line render.
- GREEN: build RSC + client component + ArcGauge primitive.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/line && pnpm typecheck`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML <select> instead of shadcn Select for filters.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate per shadcn primitives + recharts ComposedChart (translation note BL-OEE-09 decision: prefer recharts).
- Do not introduce client-side websocket dependency (P2).
- Do not skip Top Downtime Causes list — required by §10.1 layout bullet.
- Do not hardcode the 70% target — read from oee_alert_thresholds per line, fall back to tenant default.

pipeline_inputs.description: OEE-001 Per-line 24h Trend page (RSC + SWR client) with 4 ArcGauges + TrendChart + Top Downtime + Spark + controls matching oee_line_trend_page prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist: (1) 4 ArcGauge header row (A/P/Q/OEE) with target from oee_alert_thresholds, (2) recharts ComposedChart with downtime ReferenceArea + changeover ReferenceLine, (3) Top Downtime Causes max 3 entries (8-PRODUCTION downtime_events aggregated), (4) 7-day Spark per line (recharts LineChart mini), (5) window 1h/6h/24h ToggleGroup, (6) shift Select filter, (7) export trigger (OEE-M-002 modal in T-020 task scope), (8) auto-refresh-pause trigger (OEE-M-012 modal). SWR refreshInterval=60000 ms per §10.1.

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Target dashed-red ReferenceLine from oee_alert_thresholds.oee_target_pct (per-line override or tenant default 70% per §13.1 Apex baseline).
- Top Downtime Causes list shows max 3 entries.
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
